desc: Sets the current view to use a selected scope box for its crop region, or removes the existing scope box assignment.
summary: Sets the current view to use a selected scope box for its crop region, or removes the existing scope box assignment. Resolves scope box by ID, name, or auto-selects when only one exists. Uses SetViewToScopeBox for assignment/removal logic and ListScopeBoxes to enumerate available scope boxes. Related: SetCropViewCommand for manual crop rectangles.
usecase: User wants to align a view's crop to a named scope box for consistent sheet output.
notfor: Manual crop rectangles (use SetCropViewCommand). Creating new scope boxes.
precondition: Active view must support scope box assignment (plan, section, elevation — not sheet or schedule).
postcondition: View crop region is controlled by the assigned scope box, or scope box is removed.

config_inputs.name: scopeBoxId
config_inputs.description: Element ID of the scope box to assign

config_inputs.name: scopeBoxName
config_inputs.description: Name of the scope box to assign

config_inputs.name: removeScopeBox
config_inputs.description: If true, removes the current scope box

preprompts: Assigning scope box to the current view...
Setting up scope box for this view...
successprompts: Scope box '{ScopeBoxName}' applied to the view.
Done — view is now using the selected scope box.
